collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (14 total Queries, 14 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT RT, SUM(CASE WHEN jenis_kelamin = 'L' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS laki_laki, SUM(CASE WHEN jenis_kelamin = 'P' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS perempuan, COUNT(*) AS total FROM `PendudukDesa` WHERE `id_desa` = 'DESA001' GROUP BY `RT` ORDER BY `RT` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT RT, SUM(CASE WHEN jenis_kelamin = 'L' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS laki_laki, SUM(CASE WHEN jenis_kelamin = 'P' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS perempuan, COUNT(*) AS total FROM `PendudukDesa` WHERE `id_desa` = 'DESA001' GROUP BY `RT` ORDER BY `RT` ASC
